task_objective: Replace watchdog idle inference with renewable pause leases
design_decisions: Replaced _paused_pids tuple with _PauseLease dataclass using cryptographically unpredictable stdlib token.
Removed idle operation running checks and is_operation_running from ProcessWatchdog.
Implemented launchGateLease.ts frontend handler with setInterval for renewing the lease.
Updated GameLifecycleController to track pause leases instead of simple pause booleans.
results: All tests pass. Renewable pause leases are now implemented, addressing Step 5 of the plan.
